title: Craftable Netherrack│可合成下界岩
description: Added Netherrack recipe.│添加下界岩配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Netherrack can be crafted with cobblestone and nether wart. This is because nether wart is a plant from the Nether, adding a nether element to cobblestone.│下界岩可以用鵝卵石以及下界疣合成。會這麼設計是因為下界疣是下界的植物，就像給鵝卵石增添了下界的元素。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
